exercises.code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
def meta_bar(labels, values):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.bar(labels, values)
    ax.set_ylim(bottom=0)
    return {"n_bars": len(labels), "ylim0": ax.get_ylim()[0]}
print(meta_bar(["a", "b"], [1, 2]))
# D2-Explorer: packet-only re-walk S19 S19-T2-A-E3
